docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PR RECYCLING

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-26-2022 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO APR-27-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KEIMANI FRANKLIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PR RECYCLING IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY KHOA TRAN, MANAGER. SERVICE ON DEFENDANT IS DEFECTIVE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. CONTINIUANCE TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO AMEND CLAIM AND ADD DEFENDANTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
AMENDED AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 **ADDITION OF 2 DEFENDANTS** BB TRUCKING INC & RAASAN IVORY WALTON FILED BY FRANKLIN, KEIMANI
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PR RECYCLING

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-27-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-10-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT PR RECYLING IS REQUIRED IF THE CHECK CLEARS. THE COURT WILL THEN DISMISS DEFENDANT PR RECYCLING WITH PREJUDICE. PRIOR TO ARGUMENT, THE HONORABLE JUDGE MICHELLE TONG GIVES A DISCLOSURE RE: CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS. PLAINTIFF KEIMANI FRANKLIN IS PRESENT. KHOA TRAN, REPRESENTATIVE/MANAGER FOR DEFENDANT PR RECYCLING IS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE. PRIOR TO ARGUMENT, THE HONORABLE JUDGE MICHELLE TONG GIVES A DISCLOSURE RE: CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS. DEFENDANTS BB TRUCKING INC AND RAASAN IVORY WALTON ARE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT PR RECYCLING SETTLES THE CASE IN COURT FOR $3,400. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG, CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506/MT)
PROOF OF SERVICE OF CERTIFIED MAILING -DELIVERED 7/23/22 FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRANKLIN, KEIMANI AS TO DEFENDANT WALTON, RAASAN IVORY
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY FRANKLIN, KEIMANI AS TO DEFENDANT PR RECYCLING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-08-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO CONTINUE TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO AMEND WITH MORE DEFENDANTS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRANKLIN, KEIMANI AS TO DEFENDANT WALTON, RAASAN IVORY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-27-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-27-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KEIMANI FRANKLIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PR RECYCLING IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY KOHA TRAN, MANAGER. DEFENDANT BB TRUCKING IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT RAASON IVORY WALTON IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON BB TRUCKING AND DEFECTIVE SERVICE ON RAASON IVORY WALTON. DEFENDANT PR RECYCLING WAS GIVEN THE ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUEST PACKET. PROOF OF SERVICE ON PR RECYCLING ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD 5/9/22. SC-100 MAILED CERTIFIED TO BB TRUCKING INC-UNCLAIMED/UNABLE TO FORWARD
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRANKLIN, KEIMANI AS TO DEFENDANT WALTON, RAASAN IVORY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **NO SIGNATURE/SEE RECD BY LINE** SERVED APR-11-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WALTON, RAASAN IVORY
ORDER TO CONTINUE TO AUGUST 10, 2022 AT 3:30PM FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSES WITH PREJUDICED AS TO DEFENDANT PR RECYCLING. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-26-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KEIMANI FRANKLIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PR RECYCLING IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRANKLIN, KEIMANI AS TO DEFENDANT BB TRUCKING INC.
